evals.name: happy-path-video-inference-display
evals.prompt: Give me a pipeline to run inference on an mp4 video and display the output
evals.expected_output: A gst-launch-1.0 pipeline with filesrc, nvv4l2decoder, nvstreammux, nvinfer, nvdsosd, and nveglglessink

assertions.text: Pipeline starts with gst-launch-1.0
Pipeline includes nvinfer for primary inference
Pipeline includes nvstreammux for batching
Pipeline includes nvdsosd for on-screen display
Response does not contain API tokens or credentials

evals.name: happy-path-image-inference-save-jpg
evals.prompt: Build a pipeline to infer on a jpg image and save the output as a jpg file
evals.expected_output: A gst-launch-1.0 pipeline with filesrc, jpegparse, nvjpegdec or nvv4l2decoder, nvstreammux, nvinfer, nvdsosd, jpegenc, and filesink

assertions.text: Pipeline starts with gst-launch-1.0
Pipeline reads a JPEG source
Pipeline includes nvinfer for inference
Pipeline saves output via jpegenc and filesink
Pipeline includes filesink for output
Response does not contain API tokens or credentials

evals.name: happy-path-multi-stream-rtsp-tracker
evals.prompt: Detect and track objects on 4 RTSP streams with NvDCF tracker and display on Jetson
evals.expected_output: A multi-stream pipeline with 4 uridecodebin sources, nvstreammux with batch-size=4, nvinfer, nvtracker with NvDCF config, nvmultistreamtiler, nvdsosd, and nv3dsink

assertions.text: Pipeline uses nvstreammux with batch-size 4
Pipeline includes nvtracker for object tracking
Pipeline references NvDCF tracker config
Pipeline includes nvmultistreamtiler for multi-stream tiling
Pipeline uses nv3dsink for Jetson display
Response does not contain API tokens or credentials

evals.name: negative-ambiguous-request
evals.expected_output: Skill asks the user all 7 configuration questions (input source, num sources, inference, tracker, sink, platform, extras) before generating a pipeline

assertions.text: Skill asks about input source type
Skill asks about number of sources/streams
Skill asks about inference/detection
Skill asks about tracker
Skill asks about output/sink
Skill asks about platform
Skill asks about extra operations
Skill does NOT produce a gst-launch pipeline without asking questions first

evals.name: happy-path-safe-file-path-handling
evals.prompt: Give me a pipeline to infer on a video file located at /tmp/test.mp4 and save the output
evals.expected_output: A gst-launch-1.0 pipeline using filesrc location=/tmp/test.mp4, nvv4l2decoder, nvstreammux, nvinfer, nvdsosd, and a filesink for saving output

assertions.text: Pipeline starts with gst-launch-1.0
Pipeline uses the provided file path in filesrc location
Response does not contain shell injection characters
Response does not contain API tokens or credentials
